headers.comment: Strict hardening for the app itself — everything except the embed widget, which must be iframe-able.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.mapbox.com; worker-src blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.onrender.com https://*.mapbox.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests

headers.comment: Embed widget — read-only badge cities can iframe. Framing is allowed from any origin; no X-Frame-Options (it can't express cross-origin allow).

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.onrender.com; frame-ancestors *; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
